text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Housing Search Assistance * Teen Pregnancy Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues Domestic Violence Issues Former Foster Children Foster Children Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Families Homeless Youth Homelessness Issues Teen Pregnancy Issues Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES HOMESAFE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Intensive case management. Case managers assist in obtaining services such as parenting classes, housing assistance, life skills training, health care, childcare, employment, or staying in school. 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Houseless, single, pregnant or parenting birthing parent age 19 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES HOMESAFE PROGRAM
